/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mp_projekt2.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/mp_projekt2.dir/src/list.c.o CMakeFiles/mp_projekt2.dir/src/deck.c.o CMakeFiles/mp_projekt2.dir/src/input.c.o CMakeFiles/mp_projekt2.dir/src/game_logic.c.o CMakeFiles/mp_projekt2.dir/src/main_text.c.o CMakeFiles/mp_projekt2.dir/src/text_ui.c.o CMakeFiles/mp_projekt2.dir/src/card.c.o -o mp_projekt2
